basic/strings/ffsll.reason: os-test uses long (32-bit on WASM32) to hold a 64-bit value — ffsll itself works but the test constant truncates to 0

basic/sys_statvfs/fstatvfs.reason: fstatvfs() not part of WASI — no filesystem statistics interface

basic/sys_statvfs/statvfs.reason: statvfs() not part of WASI — no filesystem statistics interface
